series_metadata.series_description: Record of all incoming monies received by the Commission.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved Then destroy. ; Paper: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved Then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
